name: Reji Nair
feedback: Anusuya Krishnatreya had a truly beautiful tarot reading experience. The reading was incredibly intuitive and resonated deeply with my current situation. It didn't feel generic at all; it felt personal, accurate, and emotionally aligned with what I'm going through. The guidance was honest yet comforting, and it gave me clarity and reassurance when I needed it the most. I'm really grateful for the insight and energy shared. Wishing you continued success and light in your journey as a reader.

name: Nandani Mawani
feedback: I had to reach out and tell you — he texted me today! You were absolutely spot on with the 4 to 6 week timeframe. I have been saying the prayer you gave me, and I truly believe it helped to shift the energy and attract this message. When I came to you, I was so stuck and overwhelmed, and you helped me without a second thought. Your description of his behavior was exactly right, and your genuine, grounded advice gave me the emotional clearing I needed to wait for this moment. Thank you for being so kind and for the powerful guidance. Your gift is truly amazing! I don't have words to say thank you, as he is so egoistic and for him to start a conversation is putting down his ego and control, and this seemed impossible to me, but you helped me with this. Thanks a lot, mam.

name: Sowndaria
feedback: Anusuya Krishnatreya gave me an accurate and honest reading. Every word of hers resonated very well. Thank you very much. Keep going.

name: Shalika Bhargava
feedback: Thank you so much for your reading, Anusuya ji! I had been quite doubtful regarding some things and was feeling tense, but your reading and explanation really helped me gain more confidence over my situation. Thank you once again for your time and efforts.

name: Shrilekha Malpanii
feedback: Thank you for the insightful tarot reading — it was spot-on with what I'm facing in my life right now. The interpretation felt personal, accurate, and empowering, giving me clear guidance on next steps. I'll definitely return for more!

name: Nandani Mawani
feedback: The reading resonated with me. I initially approached her for a simple yes/no question, but she went so far beyond that. She provided a deep, thorough reading that addressed all my concerns and gave me a profound sense of mental and emotional clearing. Beyond just answering my questions, she provided a specific timeframe and even suggested a beautiful prayer to help me stay centered. What strikes me most about her is how kind and grounded she is; she makes you feel completely safe and supported throughout the process. She gave me emotional reassurance. Thank you for your generosity and your gift. Thanks for your time and patience — she is so gentle, polite and kind. Thanks universe, universe bless you.

name: Ritika Rai
feedback: I had a really reassuring and accurate reading with Anusuya Krishnatreya ma'am. She clearly described my nature, the pressure I've been putting on myself and gave realistic guidance. The timelines she gave felt really spot on. She gave calm, responsible clarity instead of fear and confusion. She's truly one of the best readers I've come across. Plus she picked up on a plan I hadn't shared and gave practical guidance.

name: Ritika Rai
feedback: I'll surely do it ma'am. You're truly one of the best I've come across.

name: Anonymous
feedback: Prediction was spot on. I have more questions but I have to take a subscription first. I will take it once I reach home.

name: Anonymous
feedback: I took a reading from Anusuya Krishnatreya and she was quite intuitive, thorough and spot on with the reading. I would highly recommend everyone to take a reading from her.

name: Tanvi Jain
feedback: Thank you, Anusuya Krishnatreya, for the insightful reading. It helped me clear my vision.

name: Nandani Mawani
feedback: I am so incredibly grateful for your guidance. I found myself stuck and overwhelmed, and you didn't hesitate for a second to step in and help me. You have such a kind and grounded personality, making me feel safe the moment we started. I was blown away by your accuracy! You described the dynamics and behaviors in my situation exactly as they are, which gave me so much confidence in your gift. You went far beyond a simple yes or no to provide genuine, honest guidance, and even a prayer that helped me deeply. It felt like a total mental and emotional clearing; the fog has finally lifted and I have a clear roadmap. Thank you for being such a supportive light when I needed it most! I would highly recommend her. Thanks mam, thanks universe.

name: Nitya Gulwani
feedback: Very accurate and insightful tarot reading. The reader was kind, professional, and gave clear guidance. It truly helped me gain clarity. Would definitely come back again.

Some additional explanation or specific context would have been appreciated.
